title: corylus americana var. humilis
intro: Corylus americana var. humilis, also known as the low-bush hawthorn or dwarf hawthorn, is a variety of the American hazelnut tree native to North America. It is a shrub that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Corylus americana var. humilis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
